Title Infringement - Free Practice 2 Deleted Lap Times

2026 HUNGARIAN GRAND PRIX 
24 – 26 July 2026 
 
  
  
From The Stewards      Document 23 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  24 July 2026 
 
        T i m e   18:25 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Free Practice 2 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 1,2,3, 7, 9,11,12, 13 and 14. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time

3 7 43 Franco Colapinto BWT Alpine F1 Team 17:04:29 2:14.517 
4 14 6 Isack Hadjar Oracle Red Bull Racing 17:04:45 OUT LAP
